name: delay-deny-defend
description: Jay M. Feinman's Delay, Deny, Defend — an expose of how insurance companies systematically avoid paying claims, and a practical guide for consumers to fight back.
useCase: Understanding insurance tactics, fighting claim denials, bad faith claims, filing effective claims, consumer rights and advocacy.
knownRisks: This book was published in 2010 — some specifics may have changed
Insurance law varies by state — consult local regulations
This is not a substitute for legal advice
